name: Vegimon

signature_move.name: Amai Toiki
signature_move.description: Poops and throws it at the enemy.

description: An Insectivorous Plant Digimon with long, outstretched vines and a wide, open mouth. It is a fierce, brutal Digimon that uses the sweet scent it breathes from its mouth to attract small Digimon and its long, tentacle-like vines to pull them in; however, it is unable to stand against larger Digimon due to its lack of offensive power. As Vegimon grows, it will start flowering and eventually bear fruit.
